info.title: dependency-graph
info.description: Allows you to create dependency graphs for .NET SDK-style projects. This is the .NET Global Tool allowing usage of dependency-graph from command line.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Dependency-graph helps you analyze the dependencies of .NET SDK-style projects.

commands.name: print
commands.description: Prints the dependency graph for a project or solution.

arguments.name: project or solution file
arguments.description: The project or solution file you want to analyze.

commands.name: trace
commands.description: Traces the paths from the root nodes to a specified dependency in the dependency graph.

arguments.name: project file
arguments.description: The project file you want to analyze.

arguments.name: dependency name
arguments.description: The name of the dependency to be traced. Can include the wildcard characters ? and *.
